items.title: What do Trump's latest comments on leaving Nato mean for the alliance?
items.summary: Trump has criticised Nato members for showing a lack of support for US objectives in Iran.

items.title: Israel intensifies Lebanon attacks and hits areas not in Hezbollah's control
items.summary: Attacks have continued as Israel has announced its intention to control swathes of south Lebanon.

items.title: Families cram into Greek court for trial into deadliest train crash
items.summary: Fifty-seven people were killed when two trains collided in 2023 in the worst rail accident in Greek history, with 36 accused in a trial expected to last years.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 美國男子臉書威脅殺害川普被捕　最重可吃40年牢飯

items.title: 美媒：美伊正討論協議　以停火換取重啟荷莫茲海峽
items.summary: 美國新聞網站Axios報導，3名美國官員表示，美國與伊朗正討論一項潛在協議，包括以停火換取伊朗重啟荷莫茲海峽（Strait of Hormuz）。  根據Axios報導，這些官員未透露相關討...…

items.title: 馬克宏會見高市早苗　互擺「龜派氣功」姿勢網路瘋傳
items.summary: 法國總統馬克宏今天造訪東京進行國是訪問期間，與日本首相高市早苗在記者會上輕鬆互動，兩人轉身面對彼此，雙手合攏擺出「龜派氣功」姿勢，這段畫面隨即在網路瘋傳。  法新社、印度媒體「寰宇一家」（W...…
